### `{r} sR$headings$severe_infections_and_nec`

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeMethodsTexts"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_methods-incidence-density.qmd")
```
:::

```{r}
#| label: tbl-incidence-density-rates
#| tbl-cap: !expr 'sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$`tbl-cap`'
#| tbl-cap-location: top

tbl_data <- reference_data |>
  neoipcr::get_incidence_density_rate_table()

tbl <- tbl_data |>
  dplyr::rename(
    !!sR$table_headers$n := "n",
    !!sR$table_headers$pooled := "pooled",
    !!sR$table_headers$q1 := "q1",
    !!sR$table_headers$q2 := "q2",
    !!sR$table_headers$q3 := "q3") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    inf = dplyr::case_match(
      as.character(.data$inf),
      "si" ~ sR$si,
      "bsi" ~ sR$primary_sepsis_bsi_sc,
      "hap" ~ sR$pneumonia_sc,
      "nec" ~ sR$necrotising_enterocolitis_sc))

cw <- compute_col_widths(tbl_data, stub_min = 25)

gt_tbl <- tbl |>
  gt(rowname_col = "inf") |>
  sub_missing() |>
  gt::tab_options(
    latex.use_longtable = TRUE,
    table.width = pct(100),
    table.font.size = cw$font_size,
    footnotes.marks = "extended"
  ) |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = !sR$table_headers$n,
    decimals = 1,
    sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
    min_sep_threshold = 2,
    locale = locale_gt) |>
  fmt_integer(
    columns = sR$table_headers$n,
    sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
    min_sep_threshold = 2)

# Pooled rate CI merge
if (include_rate_ci && "ci_lower" %in% colnames(gt_tbl$`_data`)) {
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
    cols_merge(
      columns = c(sR$table_headers$pooled, "ci_lower", "ci_upper"),
      pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})",
      rows = !is.na(tbl_data$pooled))
} else if ("ci_lower" %in% colnames(gt_tbl$`_data`)) {
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |> gt::cols_hide(columns = c("ci_lower", "ci_upper"))
}

# Quartile bootstrap CI merge
if ("q1_ci_lower" %in% colnames(gt_tbl$`_data`)) {
  if (include_quartile_ci) {
    has_boot <- !is.na(gt_tbl$`_data`[["q1_ci_lower"]])
    if (auto_quartile_ci)
      has_boot <- has_boot & !is.na(gt_tbl$`_data`[[sR$table_headers$q1]])
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$q1, "q1_ci_lower", "q1_ci_upper"),
        pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})",
        rows = has_boot) |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$q2, "q2_ci_lower", "q2_ci_upper"),
        pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})",
        rows = has_boot) |>
      gt::cols_merge(
        columns = c(sR$table_headers$q3, "q3_ci_lower", "q3_ci_upper"),
        pattern = "{1} ({2}\u2013{3})",
        rows = has_boot)
  } else {
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |> gt::cols_hide(columns = tidyselect::any_of(c(
      "q1_ci_lower", "q1_ci_upper",
      "q2_ci_lower", "q2_ci_upper",
      "q3_ci_lower", "q3_ci_upper")))
  }
}

gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
  cols_width(
    stub() ~ pct(cw$stub),
    sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(cw$n),
    sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(cw$pooled),
    sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(cw$q),
    sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(cw$q),
    sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(cw$q)) |>
  tab_row_group(
    label = sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$grp_si,
    rows = tidyselect::any_of(c(
      sR$si,
      sR$primary_sepsis_bsi_sc,
      sR$pneumonia_sc)),
    id = "grp_si") |>
  tab_row_group(
    label = sR$other,
    rows = tidyselect::any_of(sR$necrotising_enterocolitis_sc),
    id = "grp_othr") |>
  row_group_order(groups = c("grp_si", "grp_othr")) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$incidence_density_rate,
    columns = tidyselect::any_of(
     c(
     sR$table_headers$pooled,
     sR$table_headers$q1,
     sR$table_headers$q2,
     sR$table_headers$q3)),
    id = "incidence_density_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = list(
      cells_column_spanners(),
      cells_column_labels(),
      cells_row_groups()
    )
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$incidence_density_rate,
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$n_inf,
        "}}{\\text{",
        sR$patient_days,
        "}} \\times ",
        format_integer(1000),
        "$$"
      )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "incidence_density_rate")
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = sprintf(
      sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$n_footnote,
      sR$table_headers$n),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$n)) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = sprintf(
      sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$pooled_footnote,
      sR$table_headers$pooled),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$pooled)) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = sprintf(
      sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$si_footnote,
      sR$si),
    locations = gt::cells_stub(rows = sR$si))

# Sparse-data footnote for N < sparse_threshold
if (any(tbl_data$n < sparse_threshold, na.rm = TRUE)) {
  fn_text <- if (include_rate_ci) sR$sparse_data_footnote else sR$sparse_data_footnote_no_ci
  fn_text <- glue::glue(fn_text, threshold = sparse_threshold)
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl |>
    gt::tab_footnote(
      footnote = fn_text,
      locations = cells_body(
        columns = sR$table_headers$n,
        rows = tbl_data$n < sparse_threshold))
}

gt_tbl
```
